description.ko: 행성의 촉각적 층위를 시각적으로 탐구하며, 다양한 지리적 요소들을 지구 표면 역사의 하나의 응집된 태피스트리로 결합합니다.
description.en: A visual journey through the tactile layers of the planet, merging various geographical elements into a single cohesive tapestry of Earth's surface history.

prompt: Ultra-detailed macro photography of Earth's diverse textures, showcasing a seamless blend of cracked arid clay, deep green forest moss, swirling golden desert sands, and crystalline glacial ice. High-resolution geological details, satellite perspective mixed with microscopic precision, cinematic lighting, earthy organic tones, 8k resolution, TERRA-1 aesthetic.
